video.title: Cong Thuc Lam Cha Ca Thon Don Gian

scenes.script: Xin chao! Hom nay toi se huong dan cac ban lam mon cha ca thon cuc ky don gian ma ngon tuyet. Cac ban cung vao bep voi toi nao!
Dau tien, chuan bi nguyen lieu: 200g ca thon tuoi, 1 cai banh phong, 1 qua trung, hat tieu, nuoc mam, dau an va hanh tim. Tat ca rat de tim tai sieu thi.
Ca thon bo da, ranh long, roi xay nho. Banh phong nghien nho. Tron ca, banh phong, trung va cac gia vi vao mot chen lon. Tron deu tay.
Voi hop, tao hinh tron nhu banh pat. Danh dau an vao cha, ranh vang deu 2 mat. Mat dau khoang 3 phut moi mat.
Xong roi! Cha ca thon gi ra, vang giog, that thom, that ngon. Ban co the cham nuoc mam ot hoac tuong hat nem. Chuc cac ban ngon mieng!
